response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows and event-driven systems, but lacks clear evidence of leading AI systems in regulated fintech environments, scaling engineering teams to 30+, or designing multi-agent frameworks with financial compliance rigor — key requirements for a CTO role.
strengths: Experienced in event-driven architectures and open-source system design (GISCollective)
Hands-on with agentic tooling and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven ability to ship complex systems across languages and domains (DLang, Node.js, embedded)
concerns: No demonstrated experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance
Lacks evidence of scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
No clear track record in production multi-agent AI systems with real-time financial decisioning
